/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc  -fvisibility=hidden  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/wxwidgets/lib CMakeFiles/cJSON_test.dir/test.c.o -o cJSON_test  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/simonvesely/Neovim/C/Quiz/cjson/build libcjson.1.7.17.dylib -lm
